subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of divine love! That which thou didst write was perused, and from its soul-stirring contents [3.5s]... ...Briefly, in this day the greatest of deeds is to teach the Cause of God and to spread the divine fragrances.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست جام محبت آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید از مضامین دلنشینش کمال
subcodes.subjects: @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
